sections.paragraph:
Original: אפק

Transliteration: 'âphaq

Phonetic: aw-fak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hold, be strong, restrain, hold back
    1. (Hithpael)
      1. to restrain oneself, refrain
      2. to force, compel oneself

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 149

Part(s) of speech: Verb
